infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RoadWatch needs your location to track your journey and detect overspeed events.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: RoadWatch needs your location for continuous journey tracking.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RoadWatch uses the camera to capture evidence during Emergency Mode.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RoadWatch saves evidence photos to your library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: RoadWatch needs your location to track journey safety.
